x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Eligibility Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Debit Eligibility Condition in a debit term and condition defines who, which accounts, or under what circumstances a debit arrangement can be applied.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Amount Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies how much money will be withdrawn per debit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Schedule Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Defines when the debit occurs (e.g., specific date, recurring intervals).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Frequency Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Determines how often debits take place (daily, weekly, monthly, or one-time).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Method Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Defines the channel or mechanism used for the debit (direct debit, card payment, online transfer).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Trigger Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifies the event or circumstance that initiates the debit (bill due, automatic repayment, threshold reached).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Limit Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Sets maximum or minimum amounts that can be debited in a single transaction or period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Authorization Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies required approvals or consents before the debit can occur.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Fee Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Debit Penalty / Fee Condition: Defines any fees or penalties applicable if the debit fails or conditions are not met.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Adjustment Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Debit Prepayment or Adjustment Condition: Rules for modifying or adjusting debit amounts (e.g., early repayment or partial debit).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Restriction Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Lists situations where debits are not allowed (e.g., account frozen, insufficient funds).
